description: Lock asteroid_habitat_caverns to mined or rubble-pile asteroid habitat cavities rather than full asteroid industrial ecosystems or orbital habitat cities.

checks.reason: Mined asteroid caverns and excavation are the direct basis for the habitat concept.
The literature explicitly treats the asteroid hull, rubble, and regolith as radiation shielding for the interior volume.
Human habitation inside mined asteroids requires air, water, recycling, food, and lighting systems.
Asteroid industrial ecosystems are broader scaling infrastructure, not prerequisite to the cavern habitat concept.
Orbital habitat cities are adjacent settlement architectures, not a prerequisite for mined asteroid caverns.
